since_last: 58% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +4.92%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.19% · BTC +0.45% · Gold +1.80% · Nasdaq100 -0.46%. 58% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +4.92%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +4.92%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.52%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +7.95%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +7.95%, APP +7.55%, PUBM +7.43%, DV +7.24%, MGNI +7.04%. Laggards: TER -7.06%, HPE -6.61%, NXPI -6.44%, VRT -6.32%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.79% at $157.27
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.79% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
